name: proofir-c11-algebra-to-x86-64-sysv-core
author: T Savo

compiler.determinism: byte-equal term JSON and target descriptor produce byte-equal assembly

operationRealizations.targetRealization: emit first statement followed by second statement
compile condition to eax, compare against zero, branch to else label with je
emit loop head label, condition compare, exit branch, body, and back edge
operationRealizations.refusal: nontrivial invariant payloads are refused until invariant discharge is represented

operationRealizations.targetRealization: compile expression to eax and ret
compile up to six integer arguments into rdi, rsi, rdx, rcx, r8, r9 with SysV stack alignment, then call
jump to the innermost loop exit label
jump to the innermost loop head label
emit no instruction
cmp operands and set al with sete, then zero extend to eax
cmp operands and set al with setl, then zero extend to eax
cmp operands and set al with setle, then zero extend to eax
compile lhs to eax, rhs to ecx, add eax, ecx
compile lhs to eax, rhs to ecx, sub eax, ecx
compile lhs to eax, rhs to ecx, imul eax, ecx
compile operand to eax and neg eax
normalize operands to zero or one and emit and eax, ecx
normalize operands to zero or one and emit or eax, ecx
compare operand against zero and emit sete
read the deterministic SysV integer argument register assigned by first occurrence order
move integer literal into eax
compile address to rax and load DWORD PTR [rax] into eax
store eax into an assigned variable register or DWORD PTR [address]

homomorphismObligation.statement: For every supported source operation op, compile(apply(op, args)) equals target_apply(image(op), compile(args)) under the x86-64:sysv operational semantics.
homomorphismObligation.dischargeStatus: draft only, no MorphismDischargeReceipt minted in this crate

contractPreservation.statement: For any accepted term t in the core subset, contract(lift_x86_64_sysv(compile_x86_64_sysv(t))) equals repr_x86_64_sysv(contract(t)).
contractPreservation.composition: A C lifter receipt plus this compile morphism receipt plus the x86-64 lifter receipt gives the ORP v0.2 round trip theorem.

refusalPolicy.unsupportedOperations: return a refusal through CompileError rather than emit opaque or partial assembly
refusalPolicy.unsupportedSorts: non-integer constants and non-core target shapes are refused
refusalPolicy.loops: loop invariant payloads outside the unit or absent shape are refused

notes: This is a draft spec artifact. It is not signed or minted in this crate.
The core subset is hand mapped. The full operation set is mint-more-realizations, not new machinery.
